items.title: Welcome to the Demo Club
items.text: This is a sample news item showing how club news appears on the platform. Admins can add, edit and delete news from the customise screen.

items.title: Customise Your Site
items.text: Every club gets full control over their content — branding, teams, fixtures, news and committee — all driven from JSON or the admin UI.

items.title: Live Fixture Feeds
items.text: Connect your club's FA Full-Time feed and the platform pulls fixtures, results and team rosters automatically.
